label: Blinkie
summary: The ~150×20 glitter strip that declared your allegiances in a sidebar or signature.
era: Blinkies, skinny animated badges with a shiny border and a phrase like "I love my cat".

classes.name: rs-blinkie
classes.role: the 150×20 strip; pair with rs-blink for the shimmer

a11y: Just a small styled element; if it links somewhere, it's a real link. Add rs-blink for the classic shimmer (which stops under reduced motion).
